old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.31.3","title":"Build ESP32 board rows","description":"Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.31: build/package every declared T-Deck and supported Heltec ESP32-S3 Puck/application variant from a fresh clean EBS worktree.
